title: Dale Gribble Enderman
description: The Endermen made a tribute to the late Johnny Hardwick by mimicking his Dale Gribble voice.
body:
As a tribute to the late Johnny Hardwick, the Endermen will sound like Dale Gribble from King of the Hill. This pack was inspired by a L4D2 mod of similar function. He will be dearly missed. No one else can truly fill the role.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fIlFv0tpkH4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
